category_sources: source_facts.description says StateSmith is a state machine code generation tool suitable for bare metal and embedded use; official GitHub repository repeats this positioning.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is statesmith; official GitHub repository name and branding are StateSmith.
docs_sources: Official GitHub wiki and README are the project-owned documentation surfaces.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies state machine code generation for bare metal and embedded targets; source_facts.executables lists ss.cli.
